category_sources: source_facts.description says Lint & Format HTML Templates; official docs describe djLint as a command-line HTML template linter and formatter.
display_name_sources: Official docs and GitHub repository use djLint capitalization; source_facts.name is djlint.
docs_sources: Official djlint.com docs include Getting Started, CLI usage, formatter, linter, configuration, integrations, and best practices.
repo_sources: Official djlint.com docs link to the GitHub repository; GitHub repository identifies djLint as HTML Template Linter and Formatter.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official docs list profiles for django, jinja, nunjucks, handlebars, golang, and html, plus CLI lint and reformat options.
